summary: Completed frontend testing of VAT handling logic during Company registration/settings. All 11 requested features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Organization settings page accessible at /settings/organization/ - PASSED
2. Company name fields (English and Arabic) are editable - PASSED (data-testid='company-name-input', 'company-name-ar-input')
3. Country dropdown shows all GCC countries - PASSED (SA, AE, BH, KW, OM, QA)
4. VAT number field shows correct requirements based on country - PASSED (dynamic update on country change)
5. Saudi Arabia requires VAT number (marked with *) - PASSED (required=true, indicator shows '*')
6. Valid Saudi VAT number (300000000000003) saves successfully - PASSED (success message displayed)
7. Invalid VAT number (wrong format) shows Arabic error message - PASSED ('تنسيق رقم ضريبة القيمة المضافة غير صحيح - يجب أن يبدأ وينتهي بالرقم 3')
8. Empty VAT number for Saudi Arabia shows required error - PASSED (HTML5 validation 'Please fill out this field')
9. ZATCA verification status updates based on VAT validation - PASSED (shows 'مفعّل - التحقق فقط' when valid)
10. VAT validation timestamp is recorded - PASSED (shows date/time like '2026/01/27 23:06')
11. Scope notice shows 'audit and verification only' disclaimer - PASSED (4 bullet points displayed)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing organization 'FinAI Demo Company' in Saudi Arabia.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VAT handling logic fully tested. Organization settings page at /settings/organization/ has all required data-testid attributes. Country dropdown dynamically updates VAT requirements - Saudi Arabia requires VAT (15 digits, starts/ends with 3), other GCC countries VAT is optional. Valid test VAT: 300000000000003, Invalid test VAT: 123456789012345.

gcc_countries.name: United Arab Emirates - الإمارات العربية المتحدة

scope_notice_items: هذا النظام للتدقيق والتحقق فقط (audit and verification only)
لا يتم تقديم أو مصادقة الفواتير (No invoice submission)
لا يتم إجراء حسابات ضريبية (No tax calculations)
لا يؤثر على درجات التدقيق (Does not affect audit scoring)

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs. VAT validation is fully server-side using vat_validation_service.py
screenshots_taken: 02_invalid_vat_result.png - Arabic error for invalid VAT format
06_final_state.png - Final state with valid VAT saved
